description: Machine-readable coverage matrix for the windowed-scenario gate. Source of truth for what is verified — append-only AUDIT_REPORT.md is a generated narrative view. See SESSION_PLAYBOOK.md for the rules of the road.
$rules: A 'covered' tile must reference at least one scenario file under tests/scenarios/.
Each tile's scenarios[] entries must exist as files; check_coverage.py enforces this.
last_verified_commit should be the most recent commit at which the listed scenarios passed.
Scenarios may cover multiple tiles via their 'covers' array; every cover tag should map to a tile here.

tiles.description: EffectPrimitives PLUS_CHARGE effect — sets effect_plus_charge flag on a unit
EffectPrimitives: Feel No Pain (effect_fnp=N) flag triggers an FNP roll for each wound before damage applies. Validated by Supa-Cybork Body enhancement (#374).
EffectPrimitives: effect_fall_back_and_shoot=true overrides the rule that a unit which Fell Back cannot shoot/charge that turn. Validated by Kunnin' But Brutal enhancement (#374).

LeaderPairingsLoader: data-driven lookup of which CHARACTER units can be attached to which bodyguard units. Loaded from data/leader_pairings.csv and queried by FormationsPhase during DECLARE_LEADER_ATTACHMENT (#378).

Measurement.model_outside_board(pos, model): single source of truth for the off-board rule. Builds a base shape at pos, translates the local bounds by pos, and checks the resulting world-space bounding rect against the battlefield (SettingsService.get_board_width_px/get_board_height_px). Returns false safely if SettingsService is missing.
RulesEngine: weapons with effect_devastating_wounds=true convert critical wounds (unmodified 6 to wound) into mortal wounds that bypass saves. Validated by Headwoppa's Killchoppa (#374).
RulesEngine: weapons with effect_ignores_cover=true neutralize the +1 cover save modifier. Validated by Panoptispex enhancement (#374).
RulesEngine: returns the per-shot damage bonus from the WAAAGH!-energy 'Eadbanger ability. Validated by '387_waaagh_energy_eadbanger.
RulesEngine: when a unit with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed, rolls the demise dice and applies mortal-wound damage to nearby units. Validated by '386_deadly_demise_vehicle.

RulesEngine: validates a SHOOT action against the current shooter state — eligibility, target legality, weapon assignments. Validated by '370_bgnt_vehicle_shoots_in_engagement (Big Guns Never Tire seam).
TurnManager: chooses which player deploys first when the deployment phase opens. The defender always deploys first per the 10e rules. Validated by '377_defender_deploys_first.
Charge-roll modifier flag (effect_plus_charge) honoured by DECLARE_CHARGE — 'ERE WE GO stratagem path

CHARGE phase: when the charging unit's destination is congested by friendly/enemy tokens, models still attempt to reach engagement range via the closest legal positioning. Validated by 'charge_congestion.
HEROIC INTERVENTION post-charge-into-engagement trigger, USE_HEROIC_INTERVENTION 2D6 charge, CP -1
CommandPhase: at the start of each player's command phase, both players gain CP per the 10e rules (1 CP each, capped at 15). Validated by '382_cp_grant_both_players.
DeploymentPhase: a unit marked by the Castellan's mark stratagem may be redeployed once before the first turn begins. Validated by '397_castellan_mark_redeploy.
DeploymentPhase: per the 10e rules, the player chosen as defender deploys first. Validated by '377_defender_deploys_first.

Issue #87: no part of any model may extend off the battlefield. Enforced via Measurement.model_outside_board, called from DeploymentController/MovementController/ChargeController/FightController and from DeploymentPhase._validate_model_position as defence-in-depth against dispatched DEPLOY_UNIT actions.

Inverse of deployment.no_offboard_placement: a model whose base lies wholly inside the active player's deployment zone must be placed without tripping the off-board check. Regression guard for the Blade Champion bug where Measurement.model_outside_board treated shape.get_bounds() (local-space, centered on origin) as world coords and so rejected every placement.

DeploymentController.try_place_at(world_pos): the controller entry point invoked by the player's click on the board during the Deployment phase. Verifies that a valid in-zone click populates temp_positions / spawns the preview token instead of being silently rejected by an upstream guard (e.g. Measurement.model_outside_board).

End-to-end input path for the Deployment phase Confirm button (HUD_Right/.../ConfirmButton): after a model is placed, a real simulated mouse click on the button must reach _on_confirm_pressed and commit the unit (status -> DEPLOYED). Regression guard for later-z overlay panels (RollLogPanel, UnitStatsPanel) eating the click via default MOUSE_FILTER_STOP.

RollLogPanel (T35) is a passive read-out occupying the right 320px of the viewport from y=80 down. It must be MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE so it never consumes clicks that should reach HUD_Right (Undo / Reset / Confirm) or lower-z controls.

RollLogPanel hides itself when no dice rolls have been recorded so the right column isn't an empty dark strip during phases that don't roll (Deployment / Movement / Command). visible flips to true on the first roll_recorded signal and back to false if entries are cleared.

RollLogPanel renders each entry via DiceHistoryPanel.format_entry_bbcode (per-die colors, R<round> P<player> <phase> header, attacker / unit name, dice values, SUCCESS / FAILED outcome) — not the bare {timestamp, attacker, target, result} normalized fields, which surface as '<msec> · — → — · charge_roll' and are useless to the player.

LeftRoster (T37) duplicates the unit list already shown in HUD_Right and used to overlap GameLogPanel on the left edge. Hidden by default; a 'Roster' button in HUD_Bottom/HBoxContainer plus the L hotkey reveal it. When shown it raises itself via move_to_front so its cards aren't obscured by the GameLogPanel.

SecondaryMissionPanel owns the top slot of the left-side panel column. Anchored at top-left (offset_left=8, offset_top=8) with a 300x32 collapsed header that's always visible — the player toggles only expand/collapse via the header button or the M key. Previously it floated at top-center where it could be obscured by the PhaseBar substates row during the movement phase.

The left-side dashboard column is reserved 340px wide and panels stack without overlap. SecondaryMissionPanel: x=8..308, y=8..40 (collapsed header). GameLogPanel: x=0..340, y=48..bottom (always visible). LeftRoster: hidden by default; positions at x=340 (right of GameLogPanel) when toggled on. HUD_Left (Mathhammer simulation): hidden by default; offset_left=340, offset_right=740 so it sits to the right of GameLogPanel when toggled on, never overlapping the log.
GameLogPanel's bottom edge sits flush with the viewport bottom. Previously offset_bottom = -45 left a 45px gap which looked broken; now offset_bottom = 0.

UnitStatsPanel is anchored BOTTOM_WIDE and overlaps the bottom strip of HUD_Right where the deployment buttons live. The panel and its layout-only descendants (VBox, Header, Spacer) must be MOUSE_FILTER_IGNORE so the deployment buttons remain reachable; the ToggleButton keeps its own STOP so the panel still toggles.

Pre-deployment roll-off (issue #85): both players roll a D6. The winner chooses to be Attacker or Defender — Defender deploys first and takes the second turn, Attacker deploys second and takes the first turn.
FIGHT phase: the Deadly Demise ability fires when a unit is destroyed during fight, rolling demise dice and dealing mortal wounds to nearby units. Validated by '386_deadly_demise_vehicle.
FIGHT phase: the Headwoppa's Killchoppa enhancement grants devastating-wounds and charged_this_turn to the bearer. Validated by '374_headwoppa_devastating_wounds.
Fights-first sequence updated when COUNTER-OFFENSIVE used; phase.active_fighter_id, current_selecting_player
FIGHT phase: when a unit has fights_last=true, the subphase rules require all non-fights-last units to fight first. Validated by 'fights_last_select_fighter.
Fight-phase AI does not select own units as melee targets — observational scenario captures before/after screenshots of AI fight decisions
COUNTER-OFFENSIVE post-charge trigger surface, USE_COUNTER_OFFENSIVE effect, CP -2
FIGHT phase: subphases (fights-first → normal → fights-last) transition correctly when no eligible fighters remain in the current subphase. Validated by 'fights_last_select_fighter.
ScenarioRunner autoload boot, fixture load, scene swap, RNG seeding, state walking, screenshot capture

Issue #51: the Movement Phase right panel section 3 now exposes a Confirm Movement Mode button that dispatches LOCK_MOVEMENT_MODE for the active unit. Once locked, mode-radio CheckBoxes disable and the unit cannot switch mode until movement completes.
MOVEMENT phase: Da Jump teleports a unit to within 9" of the warlord and ≥9" from enemies. Bounds check rejects invalid placements. Validated by '376_da_jump_bounds.
MOVEMENT phase: Follow Me Ladz enhancement grants +2 to the bearer's Move characteristic (effect_plus_move). Validated by '394_follow_me_ladz_plus_move.
MOVEMENT phase: Kunnin' But Brutal enhancement grants effect_fall_back_and_shoot and effect_fall_back_and_charge to the bearer. Validated by '374_kunnin_but_brutal_fallback.
MOVEMENT phase: a 20-model horde unit successfully moves toward a target despite congestion from blocking units. Validated by 'horde_movement.
RAPID INGRESS end-of-movement trigger, reserves filter, USE_RAPID_INGRESS, CP -1
Multi-peer deployment sync — host deploys, client mirrors positions and coherency state
Multi-peer dice broadcast — defender re-emits result.dice on remote (T5-MP5)
Multi-peer network session lifecycle — host/join/disconnect, peer registration
Multi-peer save broadcast — broadcast_id + retry budget + dedupe (T5-MP4-RELIABILITY)
Multi-peer shooting visual broadcast — SELECT_SHOOTER/ASSIGN_TARGET/CONFIRM/COMPLETE (T5-MP3)
CommandPhase._generate_command_points: grants the per-turn CP to both players according to the 10e rules. Validated by '382_cp_grant_both_players.
DeploymentPhase.CASTELLAN_REDEPLOY action: applies the Castellan's mark redeploy effect, moving the marked unit to a new valid deployment position. Validated by '397_castellan_mark_redeploy.
FormationsPhase.DESIGNATE_WARLORD action: marks one CHARACTER as the player's warlord (is_warlord=true) and clears the flag on any prior warlord. Validated by '367_designate_warlord.
FormationsPhase.DECLARE_LEADER_ATTACHMENT action: pairs a CHARACTER leader with a bodyguard unit for the duration of the battle. Validated by '378_leader_pairing_formations.
10e: Lone Operative is a targeting restriction (not an attachment ban). LO+Leader characters CAN attach to bodyguards. FormationsPhase _validate_declare_leader_attachment honours this

MovementPhase.LOCK_MOVEMENT_MODE action: marks active_moves[unit].mode_locked=true so subsequent mode-change attempts are rejected for that unit this turn. Emits movement_mode_locked signal which MovementController listens for to disable mode radios.
MovementPhase.PLACE_DA_JUMP action: handles the Da Jump teleport, checking 9" warlord and 9" enemy bounds. Validated by '376_da_jump_bounds.
MovementPhase: applies effect_plus_move to the unit's Move characteristic during the movement step. Validated by '394_follow_me_ladz_plus_move.

RollOffPhase.CHOOSE_TURN_ORDER action: the roll-off winner picks first or second; sets meta.attacker / meta.defender / meta.first_turn_player accordingly so TurnManager._handle_deployment_phase_start gives the defender first deploy.
RollOffPhase.ROLL_FOR_FIRST_TURN action: roll a D6 for each player, declare a winner, or report a tie that triggers a re-roll. Supports dice_roll override for deterministic testing.

ShootingPhase._can_unit_shoot: returns true unless the unit has a hard blocker (Fell Back without override, etc.). Battle-shock no longer blocks shooting in 10e. Validated by '383_battleshock_can_shoot.

Pre-game warlord designation: each player picks one CHARACTER as their warlord during the formations phase. Required by FormationsPhase._validate_warlord_designation before CONFIRM_FORMATIONS will succeed. Validated by '367_designate_warlord.
T2-1 — STEALTH ability: -1 to hit on ranged attacks vs Stealth target
Issue #336 — no CP on R1 first command phase; otherwise active player only
T1-1 — MELTA X auto-resolves damage bonus at half range
T1-2 — TWIN-LINKED re-rolls all failed wound rolls
T2-M6 — base-touching regression (#321/#327)
Issue #329 — RNGService.test_mode_seed produces identical dice across runs; new helpers (randi/randi_range/randf) honor it; TransportManager + MissionManager + Mathhammer plumbed
Issue #338 — FactionAbilityManager + StratagemManager state round-trips through save/load
T2-S7 — Cover save bonus capped: Sv3+ vs AP0 in cover stays 3+ (was 2+)
Issue #356 — Multipotentiality stratagem: effect_fall_back_and_shoot overrides cannot_shoot gate in ShootingPhase + RulesEngine.validate_shoot
T2-S4..S6 — SUSTAINED HITS / LETHAL HITS / DEVASTATING WOUNDS keyword pipelines

Issue #359 — FactionStratagemLoader._map_target correctly handles 'excluding X' as not_keyword:X (was incorrectly mapping to keyword:X). Affects 'ARD AS NAILS, UNWAVERING SENTINELS, ARCHEOTECH MUNITIONS
SHOOTING phase: the WAAAGH!-energy 'Eadbanger ability grants a per-shot damage bonus during a Waaagh!-active turn. Validated by '387_waaagh_energy_eadbanger.
SHOOTING phase: in 10e, battle-shock units can still shoot (the 9e carryover that blocked shooting was removed). Validated by '383_battleshock_can_shoot.
SHOOTING phase: Big Guns Never Tire allows monster/vehicle units to shoot ranged weapons while in engagement range (at -1 to hit). Validated by '370_bgnt_vehicle_shoots_in_engagement.
SHOOTING phase: the Panoptispex enhancement gives the bearer's ranged attacks effect_ignores_cover. Validated by '374_panoptispex_ignores_cover.
SHOOTING phase: the Supa-Cybork Body enhancement grants effect_fnp=4 (Feel No Pain 4+) to the bearer. Validated by '374_supa_cybork_fnp.
